Event: Tavern of Fortune - November 2025
Event Date: 26/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: S34
Feathered Prism Sword

When attacking, has a 30% chance of restoring 16% health in self.
Once in a while, the unit throws shurikens at the farthest and nearest enemy units. When the shurikens hit, they deal pure damage equal to 350% of the sword owner's attack to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. All affected enemy units are frozen for 4 sec. For the duration, the frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Tavern of Fortune - November 2025

Event date: 26/11/2025

Sage bot code: S34

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
